_meta.description: Claude Code skill (slash command) system registry.

description.description: Trigger description — CC uses this to decide when to activate the skill. THE most important field. Include trigger conditions AND example phrases.

skill_definition.body: Markdown instructions that tell CC exactly what to do when the skill is invoked

invocation.user_facing: /skill-name [args] — user types this in the prompt
invocation.programmatic: Skill tool with skill name parameter
invocation.automatic: CC can auto-activate if description matches user intent

design_principles: Skills define WHAT to do, not WHO does it (that's agents)
Trigger description is everything — invest time in making it precise
Include 3+ example trigger phrases in the description
Progressive disclosure — start minimal, expand based on context
Composability — skills can invoke other skills
Quality gates — every external-facing output needs a validation step
Memory awareness — explicitly declare what memory files are read/written

workflow_skill.pattern: Read context → spawn agents → collect results → validate → output

generation_skill.pattern: Read context → generate → quality check → save

management_skill.pattern: Read state → aggregate → display → suggest actions
